description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a matte red label wrapping around most of its cylindrical body. The label features bold, blocky white text in a stylized font, accompanied by a pattern of white dots forming abstract, geometric shapes. The top of the can is metallic silver with a pull tab opening, and the upper rim of the can is left unpainted, revealing the bare aluminum. The label also includes a barcode and some small white text, likely indicating product details and volume. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on geometric design elements and a limited color palette.
description: A red-labeled aluminum beer can with bold white text and geometric dot patterns, topped with a metallic pull tab.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main white text in a stylized font and a cluster of white dots on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view with partial text visible and more of the red label, with the dot pattern continuing around the can.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the white dot pattern, with no large text visible and a mostly uninterrupted red label.
description_view_3: Back view showing a barcode, small white text, and the continuation of the dot pattern on the red label.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold red background with large, blocky white text and a pattern of white dots forming geometric shapes. The design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a limited color palette.
